title: The Harvest Counter
description: Use variables to track your farming progress with counters and arithmetic operations.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Let's put variables to practical use! We'll create a counter to track how many times you've harvested.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: A counter? Like counting sheep, but for harvests?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Counters start at 0 and increase each time an action happens. Create a variable called harvest_count and set it to 0!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Perfect! Now we have a counter ready to track harvests.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: After each harvest, we need to increase the counter. Update harvest_count by adding 1 to its current value!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: This adds 1 to whatever was in harvest_count before!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Each time this line runs, the counter goes up by one.

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Great! Now your code can count harvests automatically.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now let's use this in practice! Track your harvests using your counter variable.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Harvest 5 wheat crops and increment your counter after each one! At the end, your harvest_count variable should equal 5.

objectives.description: Harvest 5 wheat crops while tracking with your counter

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: The counter worked! It tracked all 5 harvests!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Excellent! Variables let you track data as your program runs.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Variables can do more than counting! You can multiply, divide, add, and subtract with them. Create a total_value variable that multiplies wheat_count by 10!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So if wheat_count is 5, total_value becomes 50?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Variables make calculations automatic. Math operators work just like you'd expect!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Wonderful! There's also a shorthand: harvest_count += 1 means the same as harvest_count = harvest_count + 1.

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Next, we'll explore variables that store text instead of numbers!
